ddls:
CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "pid" INTEGER /* Process ID */,
  "rss" INTEGER /* Resident Set Size of the process */,
  "full_rss" INTEGER /* Full Resident Set Size of the process */,
  "uss" INTEGER /* Unique Set Size of the process */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the process started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the process ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the process (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "parent_process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent process (if any) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process the event is related to */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "event_level" TEXT /* Level of the event (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process the metric is related to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_time" TEXT /* Time when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., MB, seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "children_processes" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child process */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent process */,
  "child_pid" INTEGER /* Process ID of the child process */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the child process started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the child process ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the child process (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_processes_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process that was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., full access, restricted access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process the report is for */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., pdf, csv) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, edit) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of the permission (e.g., full access, restricted access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_permission_type FOREIGN KEY ("permission_type") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
